syllogism_text: Nothing that is a liquid can be considered a beverage. It is the case that some types of milk are liquids. It follows that some milks are not beverages.

attempts.code:
% Witnesses
milk1.
liquid(milk1).

% beverage has NO facts
beverage(_) :- fail.

% E-premise constraint: No liquid is a beverage
conflict :- liquid(X), beverage(X).

% O-conclusion: Some milk is not a beverage
valid_syllogism :- milk1, \+ beverage(milk1).
